name: AI Job Application Tracker
description: Searches Gmail for job-related emails (applications, interviews, offers, rejections), uses Claude AI to extract company name, role, status, and next steps, then saves structured tracking data to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Automated job applications & status tracking with LinkedIn, Indeed & Google Sheets

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for searching job emails

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving tracking data

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID to save job tracking data

daysBack.description: Number of days to search back for job emails (default: 7)

steps.name: Build Gmail search query for job-related emails
Build Claude prompt for job extraction
Run Claude AI to extract job data
Parse Claude AI output and strip fences
Save job tracking data to Google Sheets
